description: FWER audit of 12 landmark ML papers. m = implicit comparisons from manual table audit.
note: Counts updated via manual audit of all results tables per paper. Each table contributes R*C*(R-1)/2 pairwise comparisons across rows within each column.

papers.note: 16 tables. Dominated by Table 10 (linear probe: 65 models x 27 datasets = 56,160).
12 tables (main + appendix). Largest: Table 15 (hyperparameter sweep, 870), Table 2 (GLUE, 819).
6 results tables. Dominated by Table 6 (scaling study, 1,026) and Table 5 (transfer, 546).
13 results tables (Tables 3-14). Excludes Table 16 appendix (57 MMLU subjects would add 12,768).

papers.paper: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al. 2017)

papers.note: 13 results tables (Tables 2-14). Prior automated count of 949 overcounted architecture spec columns.
8 results tables. Confirmed by both automated and manual audit.
4 model-comparison tables. Table 2 (6 models x 12 benchmarks = 180) dominates.
2 results tables. Table 1 unconditional section (12 rows x 3 cols = 198) + ablation.
3 results tables. Table 3 (zero-shot LM, 5 x 10 = 100) + Table 4 (summarization, 60).
2 results tables. Most results in figures, not tables. Genuinely few tabular comparisons.
